test.create_query: CREATE TABLE bench_convex_hull_dense (pt Point, group_id UInt32) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE bench_convex_hull_heavy (pt Point) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO bench_convex_hull_dense SELECT (toFloat64((number * 1103515245 + 12345) % 100000) / 100, toFloat64((number * 6364136223 + 1) % 100000) / 100), number % 128 FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO bench_convex_hull_heavy SELECT (sin(number) * 1000 + cos(number * 3) * 500, cos(number * 7) * 1000 + sin(number * 11) * 500) FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT groupConvexHull(pt) FROM bench_convex_hull_dense FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT group_id, groupConvexHull(pt) FROM bench_convex_hull_dense GROUP BY group_id FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT groupConvexHull(pt) FROM bench_convex_hull_heavy FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
